title: Greeting
text: Hello! Thank you for contacting the library. How can I assist you today?

title: Library Hours
text:
Our library hours are:
Monday-Friday: 9 AM - 8 PM
Saturday: 10 AM - 6 PM
Sunday: 12 PM - 5 PM

title: Book Request
text: I'd be happy to help you find that book. Could you please provide the title and author?

title: Library Card
text: To get a library card, please visit us with a valid ID and proof of address. It's free!

title: Renew Books
text: You can renew your books online through our website or by calling us. Most items can be renewed up to 3 times.

title: Closing
text: Is there anything else I can help you with today? Feel free to reach out anytime!

title: Please Wait
text: Thank you for your patience. Let me look that up for you.

title: Transfer to Specialist
text: I'm going to transfer you to a specialist who can better assist you with this request.
